title: gilibertia arborea
intro: Gilibertia arborea, also known as the tree gilbertia, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and supporting the immune system. Gilibertia arborea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
